sentences.arabic: يَعْكِسُ انْتِشَارُ الثَّقَافَةِ الشَّعْبِيَّةِ عَبْرَ مَنَصَّاتِ التَّوَاصُلِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ تَحَوُّلًا فِي مَوَازِينِ الْإِنْتَاجِ الثَّقَافِيِّ لِصَالِحِ الْأَصْوَاتِ الْهَامِشِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Širenje popularne kulture putem društvenih mreža odražava pomak u ravnoteži kulturne produkcije u korist marginalnih glasova.
sentences.translationEn: The spread of popular culture through social media platforms reflects a shift in the balance of cultural production in favour of marginal voices.
